heading: General. The fire hazard severity of building sites for buildings hereafter constructed, modified or relocated into wildland-urban interface areas shall be established by the code official based on the class of ignition-resistant construction identified for the building site on the wildland-urban interface area mapping or, alternatively, in accordance with Table 502.1. See also Appendix C.
verbatim: (u)	Section 503.1, "General," is repealed and reenacted to read as follows:
